learnings: **Talking Head + Personal Endorsement** in Entertainment achieves 39.42% engagement when creators authentically champion a single app feature with branded tags—this is the highest-performing format across all recent data.

**Hook+Demo Hybrids** in Entertainment consistently deliver 7-17% engagement when pairing absurdist humor (Cantina platform 17.07%) or narrative cliffhangers (story continuation 7.73%) with app reveals—never lead with features.

**Health + Identity Transformation** dominates at 25-35% engagement exclusively when positioned as life-changing for specific communities (Faith app 25.24%, Sobriety app 35.18%)—generic productivity positioning collapses to 0.57% even at 4.9M views.

**Talking Head + Vulnerability** in Lifestyle drives 12-17% engagement when creators challenge assumptions (12.57%) or warn against corporate tracking (17.23%)—authentic skepticism outperforms cheerleading by 2x.

**Entertainment apps require hidden reveals until final frame**—direct CTAs collapse to 0.41-0.60% engagement regardless of reach (1.2M+ views); instead lead with relatable commentary, pranks, or absurdist hooks that obscure the app entirely.

**CapCut + Entertainment Hybrids** achieve 12-21% engagement when tied to fan culture (Harry Styles edit 21.47%) or hashtag-driven content creation (CapCut hashtag showcase 12.36%)—this is the safest Entertainment bet without niche dependency.

**B2B apps escape collapse (6-11% engagement) only when positioned as democratization or creative accessibility**—AI mastery 10.98%, side hustle framing 8.95%, or no-code empowerment (8.05%)—direct feature tutorials and tutorials collapse to 0.12-0.31%.

**Silent UGC + Lifestyle aesthetics collapse to 0.46-2.01% unless tied to community signaling**—Silent UGC only works at 7-20% engagement when paired with niche hashtags (CapCut 12.36%, game aesthetics 7.71%) or relatable moments (walkie-talkie 14.73%).

**Slideshow curation achieves 10-15% engagement as the safest middle-ground format**—trending apps 14.80%, daily-use apps 11.80%, top 5 picks 12.99%—this outperforms pure demos (3-5%) without requiring niche positioning or viral hooks.

**Direct feature tutorials and product demos collapse to 1-5% engagement universally**—iPad games 2.93%, language apps 3.83-5.61%, WhatsApp hacks 3.24%, even with 4M+ views—reframe every tutorial as problem-solving, transformation, or community signaling instead.

**App Demo + Lifestyle productivity achieves 7-11% engagement when showing organizational process or aesthetic setup**—native app organization 11.70%, recipe FOMO 7.79%, home app setup 10.30%—viewers engage with lifestyle aspiration, not features.

**Text-Heavy viral content generates 1-14M views but collapses to 1-7% conversion intent**—avoid entirely for app promotion; these drive vanity metrics only (trending apps 14.80% views but likely sub-3% intent).
